extraction.description: This screenshot shows the UiPath Apps designer for the imported validation app, with the MainPage open in the Explorer panel. The page layout includes a tabbed comparison area at the top, a decision section with Reject and Approve and pay buttons, and a rejection notification text area. The left Explorer highlights app components and associated click-handler XAML files used for the approval and rejection actions.
extraction.step_instructions:
1. In the Explorer panel, open the MainPage and review the Decision section components.
2. Click on the Reject or Approve controls in the Explorer to inspect their configuration.
3. Click on OnClick Approve Button .xaml and OnClick Reject Button.xaml to review or edit the button action logic.
4. Informational screenshot — this shows the structure of the validation app page and the action handlers wired to the approval and rejection buttons.
